query:
SELECT ap.id as ae_id, ap.name, mm.year, mm.month, mm.arrUsd, mm.demosTotal, mm.dialsPw, mm.demosPw
FROM ae_profiles ap
JOIN monthly_metrics mm ON mm.aeId = ap.id
WHERE ap.name LIKE '%Joe%' OR ap.name LIKE '%Payne%'
ORDER BY mm.year DESC, mm.month DESC
LIMIT 12;
command:
